title: Gray Netherite
description: A texture pack that changes the texture of ancient debris to gray and make it glow.
body:
Glowy Gray Debris & Netherite

This resource pack transforms the classic Ancient Debris into a sleek, Grey/Slate aesthetic with a special twist. Designed for those who want a more industrial and "hardened" look for ancient debris.

Grey Textures: All Ancient Debris is now a refined grey.

Emissive Textures: The veins in the debris glow in the dark (Requires OptiFine or Iris/Oculus with Continuity).

Performance Friendly: Optimized 16x textures that stay true to the vanilla feel.

Compatibility: Built for Minecraft 1.21.1 (Pack Format 34/42).
